rows.label: tev001492_MSG0001
rows.name: [ST:playername ]! Just who I wanted to see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0002
rows.name:
That dog of yours was wandering
around, so I tried to bring
him back to your place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0003
rows.name:
But then he started barking and growling
at me like some kind of mad indigen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0004
rows.name: What the hell is WRONG with that mutt?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_JNK0010
rows.name: Apologize

rows.label: tev001492_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you're sorry for not training him better.

rows.label: tev001492_JNK0020
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: tev001492_SEL0021
rows.name: Chastise Iriina for making your dog feel threatened.

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0005
rows.name:
I don't think training was
the problem, exactly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oh, who am I kidding. This always
happens. Animals have hated me
for as long as I can remember.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0007
rows.name:
No matter how nice I am, they always
act like this. I've never even
gotten close enough to pet one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0008
rows.name:
I made him feel threatened?
I didn't DO anything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0009
rows.name:
I just approached him as slowly as
I could and tried to gently put my
hand on one of his little ears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, forget it. I just wish I could
handle dogs the way you and Lin do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0011
rows.name:
You gotta teach me the trick! I mean, I'm an
Interceptor who squares off against indigens
all day, you know? It can't be THAT hard![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0012
rows.name:
If I knew your trick, I'm sure
I could win over at least one
of the dogs in the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_JNK0030
rows.name: Teach Aggressiveness

rows.label: tev001492_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell Iriina that the secret is to charge right at the dog while screaming loudly.

rows.label: tev001492_JNK0040
rows.name: Teach Calmness

rows.label: tev001492_SEL0041
rows.name: Advise Iriina to lower her guard and reveal her true self.

rows.label: tev001492_JNK0050
rows.name: Teach Bribery

rows.label: tev001492_SEL0051
rows.name: Advise Iriina to woo the dog with food.

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0013
rows.name:
All right! I'm actually GOOD at that!
Okay, lemme try it. Ready... Set...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0014
rows.name:
HERE, DOGGY DOGGY DOGGY!
GWWWWAAAALLLLRRRRRGH!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Auuuuugh! Now it totally
hates me more than before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0017
rows.name:
Dammit! I'm never gonna
be able to pet a dog![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0018
rows.name:
I just want to cuddle a pet once in my
freaking life. Is that too much to ask?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0019
rows.name:
"Lower my guard?" As if I'M the
one who's afraid? That's absurd.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0020
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0021
rows.name:
Okay, maybe it's not quite SO
ridiculous. I guess there was
an...incident when I was young.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0022
rows.name:
I tried to pet a dog I didn't know, and got
bit. The experience drove me to toughen up.
...Or maybe it just made me afraid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0023
rows.name:
Okay then. I'll try to relax
and just...talk to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0024
rows.name:
Hey there, little guy. So, um,
I'm not your enemy, okay? And
you're not my enemy. We're buds![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0025
rows.name:
So what do you think? Can we
be friends? I'd really like
to pet your big fuzzy ears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0027
rows.name:
Huh. He stopped barking.
And his tail is wagging.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0028
rows.name:
That's good! Er, it won't
run away now, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0029
rows.name:
Then you can leave the rest to me! I'll
make sure to see him safely back home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0030
rows.name:
Wow, I finally get to
pet a dog. Thank you, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0031
rows.name:
Oh, okay! I'll just give
it the rest of my ration.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0032
rows.name:
Here ya go, buddy. One dense, flavorless nutrient
bar. Er, it doesn't smell very good. Or taste good,
actually. But it IS full of minerals and junk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0034
rows.name:
He won't even touch it! And
I think he actually hates me
more than he did before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0035
rows.name:
Dammit! I'm never gonna
be able to pet a dog![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001492_MSG0036
rows.name:
I just want to cuddle a pet once in my
freaking life. Is that too much to ask?[ST:wait ]
